special_mechanics.name: Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Time Lord can jump as a core movement mechanic

special_mechanics.name: Period-Specific Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Weapons vary by era (swords, throwing knives, firearms, grenades, laser weaponry) but do not affect movement physics

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia article provides only basic gameplay mechanics description. No precise physics values, frame data, or movement parameters documented. Game features side-scrolling action-platforming with jumping and period-specific combat, but underlying physics engine details are not available in source material.
